title: UI Aspects [Legacy4J]
description: Changes several Legacy4J features to be accurate to Legacy Console
body:
## About
This pack changes several aspects of Legacy4J to be more in line with Legacy Console Edition.

## Changes
- Resource Albums - renamed to Texture Packs
- Open to LAN - renamed to Online Game
- (Legacy Remade) Medium Biomes (Java) - renamed to Medium Biomes
- Mods - renamed to Minecraft Store
- Direct Connection - renamed to Join Friends (for use with e4mc)
- Intro sequence replaced with the one from Legacy Console
- Title changed to "Minecraft: PC Edition"

## Special Thanks
- NicSonic for making the "PC Edition" title
